title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 6.2h
paragraphs: Welcome to Patch 6.2h! This patch we have some adjustments to some champions and items, as well as Swain’s rework! Let’s dive in.
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

This patch we’re buffing Gwen, Shyvana, and Tristana to help them cut through their weaker early games and thread more impact into the late game. On the other hand, we also want Hecarim to gallop into those dives and teamfights, so we’re giving him some help. Additionally, we’re making some adjustments to Ezreal and Ryze, while also helping Seraphine hit a higher note with more balanced flexibility. And last but not least, Blitzcrank is getting some adjustments so some of the shock from his engages will be, well…less shocking.

Swain’s ultimate has always lacked a little extra oomf, so we’ve decided to let him contribute more in extended fights beyond simply tanking damage. At the same time, we’ve reworked parts of how his ability feels and numbers to ensure his power remains consistent across different builds, while still leaving room for counterplay. Please note that Swain’s update will not be live until September 25, 00:01 UTC.
Each stack of Soul Fragments heal for: 3/4/5/6% Maximum Health (Increases with level 1/5/9/13) → (2/2.5/3/3.5 + 0.5% Ability Power)% Maximum Health (Increases with level 1/5/9/13)
Explosion timer: 1s → 1.35s
Charges: Once → Infinite
[New] Cooldown between two Demonflare: 6s
Damage per second: 15/35/55 + 20% Ability Power → 10/25/40 + 15%Ability Power
Bonus Damage for every Snip: 6% Ability Power → 7% Ability Power
Bonus Damage for the last Snip: 30% Ability Power → 35% Ability Power
Damage to Jungle Camps: 80% → 105%
Damage of each Needle: 30/45/60 + 8% Ability Power →  35/50/65 + 10% Ability Power
Base Attack Damage: 54 → 58
Armor per level: 4.5 → 5
Dragon's Descent
Armor per level: 4.5 → 5
Base Health: 600 → 630
Bonus Damage: 65/100/135/170% Bonus Attack Damage → 75/110/145/180% Bonus Attack Damage
Bonus Damage: 130% Attack Damage → 135% Attack Damage
Bonus Damage: 40% Ability Power → 45% Ability Power
Shield Value: 50/80/110/140 + 25% Ability Power → 50/75/100/125 + 30% Ability Power
Bonus Movement Speed: 50/55/60/65% and decays overtime to 25% → 35/40/45/50% and decays overtime to 10%
